---
title: "Fast food, fast fashion and fast science: How AI is revealing a broken academic structure."
date: 2025-05-21
type: post
categories: [academic research, research integrity, microbiology, artificial intelligence, chat boxes]
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    meta:
      keywords: "academic research, research integrity, microbiology, artificial intelligence, chat boxes"
---

I recently reviewed a manuscript in which the authors has clear
